include_rules.label: Legal or regulatory change
include_rules.description: Include laws, decrees, resolutions, regulations, code changes, orders, or amendments that create or alter a policy rule.

include_rules.label: Monetary or financial-sector parameter
include_rules.description: Include policy-rate, reserve requirement, prudential, deposit, FX-market, bank, microfinance, or payment-system changes.

include_rules.label: Fiscal, tax, budget, subsidy, or tariff measure
include_rules.description: Include tax, excise, duty, budget, public-finance, subsidy, tariff, compensation, or fiscal-monitoring changes.

include_rules.label: Trade or customs modernization
include_rules.description: Include customs, border, clearance, declarations, trade corridor, import/export, WTO, or market-access measures.

include_rules.label: Structural implementation program
include_rules.description: Include privatization, SOE, energy, infrastructure, agriculture, digital-government, or business-environment reforms with implementation steps.

include_rules.label: Formal consultation or draft measure
include_rules.description: Include formal consultations and draft measures when the text identifies the proposed policy instrument or mechanism.

include_rules.label: Binding international financing or agreement
include_rules.description: Include signed agreements, grants, loans, and donor financing when tied to a policy program or implementation measure.

exclude_rules.label: Routine meeting without policy measure
exclude_rules.description: Exclude meetings, talks, roundtables, visits, and side-event diplomacy unless the text states a legal, budgetary, regulatory, or implementation measure.

exclude_rules.label: Cooperation news without instrument
exclude_rules.description: Exclude generic cooperation, partnership, or prospect-expansion announcements without a signed instrument, financing amount, or concrete policy action.

exclude_rules.label: Training or outreach
exclude_rules.description: Exclude trainings, calendars, awareness weeks, conferences, and public outreach unless a policy measure is explicitly announced.

exclude_rules.label: Ceremonial or cultural event
exclude_rules.description: Exclude commemorative, cultural, spiritual, award, and protocol events.

exclude_rules.label: Administrative update only
exclude_rules.description: Exclude internal performance-discipline, reporting, staffing, and ministry process updates without a policy measure.

relevance_scoring.high_relevance: 70-100: explicit legal, regulatory, budget, monetary, trade, or implementation measure.
relevance_scoring.medium_relevance: 40-69: plausible reform candidate with a formal consultation, program, agreement, or parameter signal.
relevance_scoring.low_relevance: 0-39: generic news, routine activity, or insufficient source evidence.

exclusion_reasons.description: The text does not identify a legal, regulatory, fiscal, monetary, trade, implementation, or financing measure.
The item is routine meeting or diplomatic engagement coverage without an explicit policy measure.
The item announces cooperation or prospects but no signed instrument, financing commitment, or policy change.
The item is training, awareness, outreach, or event logistics only.
The item is ceremonial, cultural, commemorative, or protocol content.
The item is internal administrative reporting without a policy measure.
The text matched weak signals but not enough evidence for intake.
The item did not expose a stable item-level source link.

candidates.title: Analytical Report on the Fulfillment of Target Indicators in Agriculture, Forestry, and Fisheries for the First Quarter of 2026
candidates.summary: In the first quarter of 2026, the output growth rate in agriculture, forestry, and fisheries was 5.1 percent, compared to the same period last year. This included a 4.8 percent increase in agriculture, 3.1 percent in forestry, and 6.1 percent in fisheries.
